div1.entryFree:
Breather, 1) one who lives: when all the --s of this world are dead, Sonn. 81, 12. I will chide no b. in the world, As III, 2, 297. she shows a body rather than a life, a statue than a b. Ant. III, 3, 24.
2) one who utters sth.: no particular scandal once can touch, but it confounds the b. Meas. IV, 4, 31.
